# CLI Reference

Every operator-facing console-script declared in [`pyproject.toml`](../../../pyproject.toml) under `[project.scripts]`. After `pip install -e .` each name resolves to a binary on `$PATH`.

> This page is regenerated by `bash bin/ops/generate-reference-docs.sh`. The contents below are seeded from `[project.scripts]` at the time of the Phase 15 commit; CI re-runs the generator on every build so each subpage embeds the live `--help` output of its matching console-script.

| Script | Module entry-point |
|--------|--------------------|
| `media-stack-apply-scale-policy` | `media_stack.cli.commands.apply_scale_policy_main:main` |
| `media-stack-backup` | `media_stack.cli.commands.backup_stack_main:main` |
| `media-stack-bootstrap-all` | `media_stack.cli.commands.controller_all_main:main` |
| `media-stack-build-controller` | `media_stack.cli.commands.build_controller_image_main:main` |
| `media-stack-build-ui` | `media_stack.cli.commands.build_ui_image_main:main` |
| `media-stack-controller` | `media_stack.cli.commands.controller_main:main` |
| `media-stack-deploy` | `media_stack.cli.commands.deploy_stack_main:main` |
| `media-stack-deploy-verify` | `media_stack.cli.commands.deploy_verify_main:main` |
| `media-stack-generate-bootstrap-config` | `media_stack.services.jobs.bootstrap_config_generator:main` |
| `media-stack-generate-envoy-config` | `media_stack.services.edge.envoy_config_generator:main` |
| `media-stack-install` | `media_stack.services.apps.stack.cli.install_main:main` |
| `media-stack-microk8s-reconcile` | `media_stack.cli.commands.microk8s_reconcile_main:main` |
| `media-stack-microk8s-smoke` | `media_stack.cli.commands.microk8s_smoke_test_main:main` |
| `media-stack-render-arch-diagrams` | `media_stack.cli.commands.render_architecture_diagrams_main:main` |
| `media-stack-render-promises` | `media_stack.cli.commands.render_promises_reference:main` |
| `media-stack-reset-admin` | `media_stack.cli.commands.reset_admin_main:main` |
| `media-stack-restore` | `media_stack.cli.commands.restore_stack_main:main` |
| `media-stack-run-job` | `media_stack.cli.commands.run_controller_job_main:main` |
| `media-stack-run-unit-tests` | `media_stack.cli.commands.run_unit_tests_main:main` |
| `media-stack-scaffold-job-test` | `media_stack.cli.commands.scaffold_job_test:main` |
| `media-stack-set-pvc-storage-class` | `media_stack.cli.commands.set_pvc_storage_class_main:main` |
